---
format: revealjs
filters:
  - circle-flow
---

# Pie

## 5 Items

::: pie
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
::: item
David
:::
::: item
Eve
:::
:::

# Item counts

## 1 Item

::: circle-flow
::: item
Alice
:::
:::

## 2 Items

::: circle-flow
::: item
AliceAndLisaHasAFriend
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
:::

## 3 Items

::: circle-flow
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
:::

## 4 Items

::: circle-flow
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
::: item
Dave
:::
:::

## 5 Items

::: circle-flow
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
::: item
Ethan
:::
::: item
Frankie
:::
:::

## 6 Items

::: circle-flow
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
::: item
Dave
:::
::: item
Ethan
:::
::: item
Frankie
:::
:::

# Node shapes

## node-circle (default)

::: circle-flow
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
::: item
Dave
:::
:::

## node-box

::: {.circle-flow .node-box}
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
::: item
Dave
:::
:::

## node-none

::: {.circle-flow .node-none .arrow-curved}
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
::: item
Dave
:::
:::

# Arrow types

## arrow-chevron (default)

::: {.circle-flow .node-box}
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
::: item
Dave
:::
:::

## arrow-curved

::: {.circle-flow .node-box .arrow-curved}
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
::: item
Dave
:::
:::

## arrow-thin

::: {.circle-flow .node-box .arrow-thin}
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
::: item
Dave
:::
:::

## arrow-ring

::: {.circle-flow .node-box .arrow-ring}
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
::: item
Dave
:::
:::

## arrow-arc

::: {.circle-flow .node-box .arrow-arc}
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
::: item
Dave
:::
:::

## arrow-double

::: {.circle-flow .node-box .arrow-double}
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
::: item
Dave
:::
:::

# Colors

## all nodes same color

::: {.circle-flow .node-box node-color="#27ae60"}
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
::: item
Dave
:::
:::

## arrow color only

::: {.circle-flow .node-box arrow-color="#e74c3c"}
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
::: item
Dave
:::
:::

## node and arrow color

::: {.circle-flow .node-box node-color="#e67e22" arrow-color="#c0392b"}
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
::: item
Dave
:::
:::

## each node different color

::: {.circle-flow .node-box}
::: {.item color="#e74c3c"}
Alice
:::
::: {.item color="#e67e22"}
Bob
:::
::: {.item color="#27ae60"}
Carol
:::
::: {.item color="#8e44ad"}
Dave
:::
:::

## mixed: base color with overrides

::: {.circle-flow .node-box node-color="#2980b9"}
::: item
Alice
:::
::: {.item color="#e74c3c"}
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
::: {.item color="#e74c3c"}
Dave
:::
:::

## node-none with arrow color

::: {.circle-flow .node-none .arrow-curved arrow-color="#e67e22"}
::: item
Alice
:::
::: item
Bob
:::
::: item
Carol
:::
::: item
Dave
:::
:::
